name: Beast
description: Epic Torgue class mod for Salvador the Gunzerker, built around Just Got Real, Incite, and Sexual Tyrannosaurus. Boosts reload speed and health.
notes: The Altered prefix is a nod to the 1988 game Altered Beast. The item card may show an incorrect Reload Speed value.

special.description: At max level, boosts Reload Speed by 57.5% and increases Health by 1,101,229.
